name: Memory (Mem0)
description: Mem0 memory backend for OpenClaw — platform or self-hosted open-source. Auto-recall and auto-capture remain configurable, and this fork preserves the OSS graph-store compatibility used by the Quin stack.

apiKey.label: Mem0 API Key
apiKey.help: Platform mode only. Prefer ${MEM0_API_KEY} or a SecretRef instead of plaintext config values.

anonymousTelemetryId.label: Anonymous Telemetry ID
anonymousTelemetryId.help: Optional stable anonymous identifier used by newer Mem0/OpenClaw builds.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation context after each agent turn. Upstream default is off unless explicitly enabled.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn. Upstream default is off unless explicitly enabled.

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: Only store user preferences and important facts...
customInstructions.help: Natural language rules for what Mem0 should store or exclude (platform mode)

customCategories.label: Custom Categories
customCategories.help: Map of category names to descriptions for memory tagging (platform mode only). Sensible defaults are built in.

customPrompt.label: Custom Prompt (Open-Source)
customPrompt.help: Custom prompt for open-source mode memory extraction.

enableGraph.label: Enable Graph Memory
enableGraph.help: Enable Mem0 graph memory for entity relationships (platform mode only)

searchThreshold.label: Search Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for search results (0-1). Upstream default: 0.3

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve

oss.label: Open-Source Configuration
oss.help: Optional. Configure custom embedder, vector store, LLM, history DB, or graph store (Neo4j) for open-source mode. Has sensible defaults — only override what you need.

customPrompt.description: Custom prompt injected as a CUSTOM_PROMPT rule into the graph extraction LLM.
